targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) AS value FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stage_id) AS value FROM stage_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stage_id) AS value FROM stage_governance WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_skew_ratio > 2

panels.title: Avg CPU Efficiency
panels.description: cpu_time / run_time across all stages. < 0.5 indicates low CPU utilization

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(cpu_efficiency) AS value FROM stage_governance WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND cpu_efficiency IS NOT NULL

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(io_bytes_read) AS 'Bytes Read' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND io_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(io_bytes_written) AS 'Bytes Written' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND io_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(shuffle_bytes_read) AS 'Shuffle Read' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND shuffle_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(shuffle_bytes_written) AS 'Shuffle Written' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND shuffle_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(duration_ms) AS 'Avg Duration' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, MAX(duration_ms) AS 'Max Duration' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, MIN(duration_ms) AS 'Min Duration' FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(heap_used) AS 'Heap Used' FROM jvm_memory_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND heap_used IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(non_heap_used) AS 'Non-Heap Used' FROM jvm_memory_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND non_heap_used IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(gc_count) AS 'GC Count' FROM jvm_gc_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND gc_count IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(gc_time_ms) AS 'GC Time' FROM jvm_gc_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND gc_time_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(duration_ms) AS 'Stage Duration' FROM stage_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(num_tasks) AS 'Task Count' FROM stage_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND num_tasks IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT app_id, job_id, job_success, duration_ms, num_stages, FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS completed_at FROM job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Data Skew Detection
panels.description: Stages with duration_skew_ratio > 2 indicate data skew (max task duration / avg task duration)

targets.rawSql: SELECT app_id, stage_id, task_count, stage_duration_ms, avg_task_duration_ms, max_task_duration_ms, min_task_duration_ms, duration_skew_ratio, io_read_skew_ratio, io_write_skew_ratio, shuffle_read_skew_ratio FROM stage_governance WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Resource Efficiency
panels.description: CPU efficiency, GC overhead, shuffle wait, spill ratio per stage

targets.rawSql: SELECT app_id, stage_id, task_count, cpu_efficiency, gc_overhead_ratio, shuffle_wait_ratio, spill_ratio, deserialize_overhead, scheduler_delay_ratio FROM stage_governance WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT ROUND(bucket_le) AS 'Bucket LE (ms)', SUM(bucket_count) AS 'Count' FROM task_histogram_buckets WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND metric_name = 'spark.task.duration_ms' AND app_id IN ($app_id) GROUP BY bucket_le ORDER BY bucket_le

panels.title: Small File Detection
panels.description: Stages with avg_output_bytes_per_task < 32MB may indicate small file problem

targets.rawSql: SELECT app_id, stage_id, task_count, total_bytes_read, total_bytes_written, total_shuffle_bytes_read, total_shuffle_bytes_written, total_records_read, total_records_written, avg_output_bytes_per_task, avg_output_records_per_task, small_output_task_count FROM stage_governance WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Task Detail
panels.description: Latest tasks with IO, duration, and resource metrics

targets.rawSql: SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, app_id, executor_id, stage_id, task_id, task_success, duration_ms, io_bytes_read, io_bytes_written, shuffle_bytes_read, shuffle_bytes_written, shuffle_fetch_wait_time_ms, executor_run_time_ms, executor_cpu_time_ns, jvm_gc_time_ms, disk_bytes_spilled, memory_bytes_spilled FROM task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT execution_id) AS value FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id)

SELECT AVG(duration_ms) AS value FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL

SELECT SUM(join_count) AS value FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND join_count IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT execution_id) AS value FROM sql_query_table_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id)

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(duration_ms) AS 'Avg Duration' FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, MAX(duration_ms) AS 'Max Duration' FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(shuffle_bytes_read) AS 'Shuffle Read' FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND shuffle_bytes_read IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(shuffle_bytes_written) AS 'Shuffle Written' FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) AND shuffle_bytes_written IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: SQL Table IO Detail
panels.description: Per-table scan/write bytes, rows, files for each SQL query execution

targets.rawSql: SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, app_id, execution_id, table_name, operation, bytes, `rows`, files_read, time_ms FROM sql_query_table_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, app_id, execution_id, duration_ms, shuffle_bytes_read, shuffle_bytes_written, join_count FROM sql_query_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND app_id IN ($app_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT app_id FROM task_metrics ORDER BY app_id
list.label: App ID
list.name: app_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT app_id FROM task_metrics ORDER BY app_id
